title: Leitstand live operations closeout
goal: Track the remaining operational closeout for the supervised Leitstand runtime after canonical HTTPS and runtime health became live: keep the root-persistent Caddyfile gap explicit while recording the completed DNS and health receipt work.
completion: Root-owned Caddy configuration contains a Leitstand host route for leitstand.heimgewebe.home.arpa to 127.0.0.1:3000 and survives reload/restart without user-level reapply.
Pi-hole and heim-pc resolve leitstand.heimgewebe.home.arpa to exactly 192.168.178.55, and canonical HTTPS smoke succeeds without resolver override.
Leitstand exposes a deterministic read-only runtime health receipt at /health and canonical HTTPS /health reports status ok.
